recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat
recommendations.overview: Washed-up MMA fighter Cole Young, unaware of his heritage, and hunted by Emperor Shang Tsung's best warrior, Sub-Zero, seeks out and trains with Earth's greatest champions as he prepares to stand against the enemies of Outworld in a high stakes battl

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: The Warriors Gate
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious chest opens a gateway through time, teen gamer Jack is transported to an ancient empire terrorized by a cruel barbarian king. Jack will need all of his gaming skills as he battles to defeat the barbarian, protect a beautiful prince

recommendations.title: Mulan
recommendations.overview: When the Emperor of China issues a decree that one man per family must serve in the Imperial Chinese Army to defend the country from Huns, Hua Mulan, the eldest daughter of an honored warrior, steps in to take the place of her ailing father. She is s

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: Samurai I: Musashi Miyamoto
recommendations.overview: Struggling to elevate himself from his low caste in 17th century Japan, Miyamoto trains to become a mighty samurai warrior.

recommendations.title: Skiptrace
recommendations.overview: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

recommendations.title: Hammer of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Action epic sees a passionate young man transform into a brutal warrior as he travels the unforgiving landscape in search of his long lost brother Hakan The Ferrocious, whose people are relying on him to restore order to their kingdom.

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: London, At the Edge of Time
recommendations.overview: To save the future from a terrible fate, Marinette becomes Chronobug and teams up with Bunnyx to defeat a mysterious opponent who travels through time.

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.
